title: GRO-DFTB: Integrating SCC-DFTB with GROMACS for Energy-Conserving QM/MM Molecular Dynamics
description: An open-source QM/MM interface coupling the self-consistent-charge density-functional tight-binding (SCC-DFTB) method, as implemented in DFTB+, to the GROMACS molecular dynamics engine through its native IForceProvider/MDModule architecture. Features include Gaussian-damped cutoff and PME-compatible electrostatic embedding, link-atom force projection for covalent QM/MM boundaries, and bitwise-reproducible checkpoint/restart. Validated on six benchmark systems (3-32 QM atoms) with NVE energy conservation well below the 0.005 kJ/mol/ps/atom acceptance threshold.

creators.name: Vchirawongkwin, Viwat
